name: IPrimitive
description: Contract for all workflow primitives. Every primitive registered in the Beddel registry must implement this interface. The executor calls execute() with the step's config dict and the current ExecutionContext.

methods.name: execute
methods.description: Execute the primitive with the given configuration and context. The result will be stored in context.step_results[step_id].

behavioral_expectations: Must implement nominal subtyping (ABC) — explicit subclassing required
execute() is abstract and must be implemented by all subclasses
execute() must raise PrimitiveError when the primitive encounters an execution failure
The config dict is primitive-specific — each primitive defines its own expected keys
Primitives access dependencies exclusively via context.deps (never via constructor injection of external services)
